name: @stackra/http
purpose: Multi-driver HTTP client — axios/fetch connectors, middleware + interceptor pipelines, streaming (SSE/NDJSON), circuit breaker, rate limiting, React hooks.
capabilities: Circuit breaker + rate limiting per client
Optional rxjs bridge for reactive consumers
when_to_use: Making authenticated REST calls, streaming responses, or wiring per-endpoint circuit breakers.
when_not_to_use: For server-cached queries prefer @stackra/query; for realtime channels use @stackra/realtime.
